hero.headline: Cajun Cards & Collectibles
hero.copy: A subscription-first TCG club for collectors who want early drop alerts, live break access, trade-night perks, and a little lagniappe with every month.

announcements: Square checkout links can be updated any time in config/site.json.
No on-site payments are collected on this GitHub Pages build.
Subscriptions redirect to secure Square checkout.

subscriptions.name: Bayou Starter
subscriptions.summary: For collectors who want the drop radar, event calendar, and member-only alerts without overcommitting.
features: Early alerts for sealed product and singles
subscriptions.bestFor: Casual collectors, parents, and new TCG players

subscriptions.name: Lagniappe Club
subscriptions.summary: The core collector membership with useful monthly value, break priority, and members-only opportunities.
features: Priority access to live break signups
subscriptions.bestFor: Active TCG collectors who follow drops and breaks

subscriptions.name: Fleur-de-Lis Elite
subscriptions.summary: A premium collector service for curated finds, VIP access, and a higher-touch monthly experience.
features: First look at rare sealed opportunities
subscriptions.bestFor: Serious collectors building a sharper collection

shopLikeFeatures.title: Drop Calendar
shopLikeFeatures.copy: A clean schedule for upcoming releases, member windows, live breaks, and trade nights.

shopLikeFeatures.title: Collector Wishlist
shopLikeFeatures.copy: Members can use the wishlist planner to organize chase cards, sealed targets, and grading candidates.

shopLikeFeatures.title: Break Priority
shopLikeFeatures.copy: Subscription tiers can receive priority reminders before public live break signups open.

shopLikeFeatures.title: Secure Checkout Redirects
shopLikeFeatures.copy: Every subscription call-to-action sends traffic to your Square checkout link instead of collecting payment here.

calendar.title: Community trade table and collection review
Members receive first notice for the next live break
Sealed product and singles preview email

faq.question: Where do subscription payments happen?
faq.answer: All subscription buttons redirect to Square checkout links that you control.

faq.question: Can I change the Square links later?
faq.answer: Yes. Update config/site.json and redeploy, or use the Admin helper to preview changes and export replacement JSON.

faq.question: Does this GitHub Pages site store customer payment data?
faq.answer: No. This static webapp redirects to Square and does not process or store card data.
